title: Fix TUI render layout bugs from review
description:
Three bugs found in review of selector.rs/bottom_ui.rs/layout.rs:
1. ERROR layout.rs: Input box height uses width-6 for wrap but renderer uses width-3 (INPUT_MARGIN). Fix: use INPUT_MARGIN consistently in calculate_input_height.
2. WARN selector.rs:283: Column header padding uses format! char-count, items use display_width cells. Fix: use display_width for header too.
3. WARN bottom_ui.rs:354-371: Drop-level thresholds use .len() (bytes) for model_name, project, branch, think. Fix: use display_width() for all four.
4. NIT bottom_ui.rs:191-202: scroll_to_cursor runs outside content_width>0 guard, uses stale cursor state. Fix: move inside guard.
Review saved at ai/review/tui-render-layout-review-2026-02-20.md
